$comment: Registered Action Type — ComplianceReviewBoard. Import this payload via Orchestrator ▶ Action Center ▶ Action Types ▶ Upload before deploying QueueProcessor.xaml. The CatalogName referenced in CreateFormTask must match the 'name' field exactly (case-sensitive).
name: ComplianceReviewBoard
description: Human-in-the-loop review task presented to the Researcher Review Board / approvers when the Anomaly Risk Agent flags hitlRequired=true or route=ACTION_CENTER. The researcher sees the full AI triage context and chooses a remediation disposition.

form.title: Compliance Review Board — Incident Triage Decision
form.description: Review the AI triage output and select the authorised remediation disposition for the training run.

readOnlyContext.title: AI Triage Summary (read-only)
readOnlyContext.description: Populated automatically from the IncidentReports queue item SpecificContent.

decision.title: Board Decision
decision.description: Authorised disposition. OVERRIDE_* actions require a minimum 30-character justification in Reviewer Notes.
enumTitles: Override AI → Proceed (reviewer overrides HITL flag)
Override AI → Hold (reviewer escalates beyond AI recommendation)

reviewerNotes.title: Reviewer Notes
reviewerNotes.description: Mandatory audit justification. Minimum 10 characters; 30+ required for OVERRIDE decisions.

reviewerName.title: Reviewer Name / E-Signature
reviewerName.description: Full name of the authorised compliance officer approving this decision.

workOrderId.title: Work Order ID (optional)
workOrderId.description: Generated work order reference when a field action is required. Pattern: WO-YYYY-NNNN.

outcomeMapping.description: Maps each form 'decision' value to the downstream BPMN variable complianceOutcome read by the Maestro gateway after Action Center completion.

deployment.note: Register this action type BEFORE publishing the QueueProcessor workflow. Steps: Orchestrator → Tenant → Action Center → Action Types → New → paste this JSON. The 'name' field becomes the CatalogName argument in CreateFormTask.
